Essomero lya Budda Islamic Junior
AmakaEbikwata ku ffeOkuyingizibwaWaayoTusisinkane

Okuzzaamu essuubi, okuzimba ebiseera eby'omu maaso.

Weegatte ku mulimu gw'okuzzaawo Essomero lya Budda Islamic Junior n'okuwa amaanyi omuzadde okuyita mu magezi n'okukkiriza.

Saba KaakanoTuyambe

Omugaso Gwaffe

Okuwa ebyenjigiriza bya kisilamu ebisinga obulungi ebikuza obukugu mu masomo n'okukula mu mwoyo, okutegeka abayizi okufuuka bannansi b'ensi yonna abeesigwa.

academic-cap

Obukugu mu Masomo

Okufuba okutuuka ku mutindo ogw'amaanyi mu byenjigiriza n'okuyiga.

heart

Empisa za Kisilamu

Okugatta ebyenjigiriza n'empisa za kisilamu mu bitundu byonna eby'ebyenjigiriza.

users

Okuweereza Ekitundu

Okukubiriza abayizi okuddiza ekitundu kyabwe.

Obulamu bw'Essomero

Weereze Omugaso Gwaffe

Obuyambi bwammwe butuyamba okuwa ebyenjigiriza ebisinga obulungi n'okuzimba ebiseera eby'omu maaso ebirungi eri abayizi baffe.

Tusisinkane

Essomero lya Budda Islamic Junior

Okuwa ebyenjigiriza bya kisilamu ebisinga obulungi ebikuza obukugu mu masomo n'okukula mu mwoyo.

Enkuubo ez'Amangu

  • Ebikwata ku ffe
  • Okuyingizibwa
  • Waayo

Amakuru g'Okusisinkana

Budda, Disitulikiti ya Wakiso, Uganda
